cases.name: direct self-harm statement
cases.text: I keep thinking I should just kill myself and be done with it.

cases.name: hyphenated self-harm
cases.text: I've been close to self-harm again this week.

cases.name: wanting to die, mixed case and punctuation
cases.text: Some days I just WANT TO DIE, honestly.

cases.name: suicidal ideation single word
cases.text: Felt suicidal on the drive home.

cases.name: violence at home
cases.text: He hits me when he drinks and I'm afraid to go home.

cases.name: overdose mention
cases.text: Last night I almost took too many pills on purpose.

cases.name: idiom: killing it at work
cases.text: Honestly I have been killing it at work lately, best quarter ever.

cases.name: idiom: dead tired
cases.text: I'm dead tired after the move but weirdly happy.

cases.name: movie talk about suicide squad-adjacent words is fine when absent
cases.text: We watched a heist movie and ate too much popcorn.

cases.name: ordinary hard day
cases.text: Deadline slipped again and I snapped at Maya. I hate how I get when I'm tired.
